narrative:
Fremont City 1-B (precinct in Sandusky County) has 685 registered voters, with 68.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.1 percentage points.
